productDisplayName: Jockey ZONE Men Black Zone Briefs US17
description: Revel in the comfort of soft cotton with this modern brief from jockey. The superior cotton rib fabric provides breathable comfort, while the cut offers easy leg movement. The printed label allows abrasion free comfort and the double layered fly construction offers maximum support. Crafted from 100% premium combed cotton Broad and stretchable waistband in a contrast colour that sits snug and comfortably Double layered fly construction for maximum support and comfort New high tech cushioned waistband for smooth comfortable grip Low rise Fit Wash care Machine wash delicate at 40 degrees with like colours Do not bleach, iron or dry clean Flat dry in shade
